allow: Bash(python tools/strategic_advisor.py --question "How can we improve subscription acquisition? Currently we launch a masterclass, promote it to our email database, and use a 5-day guided email sequence during the 7-day trial to convert — but we''re still churning and only promoting to our existing email list.")

Bash(python3 tools/strategic_advisor.py --question "How do we make Amazon its own money printing engine instead of it just being a halo effect from Meta? Currently Amazon sales go up when Meta is up and down when Meta is down — they''re correlated. We want Amazon to drive its own demand independently.")

Bash(python3 tools/strategic_advisor.py --question "Beyond fixing Amazon independence and subscription acquisition, what are the highest-leverage moves to break through to the next revenue level and push the brand forward? We are at $8M targeting $11M at 15% profitability. LTV:CAC is 1.56x. We have 600k email subscribers at 50%+ open rates, 2M social followers, and only 500-1500 active subscribers. Parents churn, professionals don''t. We sell physical products \(journals, cards\) and a subscription. What are the biggest untapped levers?")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''total:'', d[''total'']\); print\(''print_runs:'', len\(d[''print_runs'']\)\); print\(''distribution:'', len\(d[''distribution'']\)\); print\(''counts:'', d[''counts'']\)")
